name: Steamed King Salmon with Basil Sauce
recipeIngredient: sliced diagonally into 12 strips, 1 inch wide and 4 inches long
recipeInstructions:
1. On each strip of salmon place a spinach leaf.
2. Fold the salmon strip over on top of itself.
3. Place the salmon in a steamer and cook for 2 minutes, or until just done.
4. On each individual serving plate place an equal amount of Basil Sauce.
5. Artfully arrange three of the salmon strips and three endive spears on top.
6. Garnish the dish with the caviar.
